title: 5 New Career Sectors Nobody Told You Are Exploding in the AI Era
description: The AI job market is shifting fast  and five completely new career sectors are rising faster than software engineering ever did.From MLOps to AI Safety to Generative Engineering, these roles are becoming the backbone of the global economy.If you’re a student or early-career professional, these are the roles you should track right now.Because the people who understand AI fundamentals today… will lead the industry tomorrow. Subscribe to Full Disclosure for more deep-dives into careers, AI, tech, and the future of work.
